commands: set -euo pipefail; sudo systemctl restart fjcloud-api; systemctl is-active fjcloud-api; for i in $(seq 1 30); do if curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:3001/health >/dev/null; then echo "health_ok_after_seconds=$i"; break; fi; sleep 1; if [ "$i" -eq 30 ]; then echo "health_timeout" >&2; exit 7; fi; done; journalctl -u fjcloud-api --since "10 minutes ago" --no-pager
